name: Site Status Checker
description: A daily uptime check for a list of URLs you configure on install. Writes status to status-log.md and updates the dashboard with current counts.

schema.label: Sites to Watch
schema.description: One URL per item. HTTP or HTTPS. You can add and remove entries after install via the Configuration button on the dashboard.

schema.label: Request Timeout (seconds)
schema.description: How long to wait for each URL before giving up.

modelRecommendation.rationale: Simple tool-use task — HTTP GETs + a short summary. Haiku is plenty and keeps cost low when the cron runs daily.
